description: Pricing Summary Report - aggregates line items by return/ship status
sql_snippet: SELECT l_returnflag, l_linestatus, SUM(l_quantity), SUM(l_extendedprice)... FROM LINEITEM

description: Minimum Cost Supplier - finds suppliers for parts with minimum cost in region
sql_snippet: SELECT s_acctbal, s_name, n_name, p_partkey... WHERE ps_supplycost = (SELECT MIN(ps_supplycost)...)

description: Shipping Priority - 3-way join with aggregation and date filtering
sql_snippet: SELECT l_orderkey, SUM(l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount)) as revenue... FROM CUSTOMER, ORDERS, LINEITEM

description: Order Priority Checking - counts late-delivered orders using EXISTS
sql_snippet: SELECT o_orderpriority, COUNT(*) FROM ORDERS WHERE EXISTS (SELECT * FROM LINEITEM WHERE l_commitdate < l_receiptdate)

description: Local Supplier Volume - 6-way join for regional revenue analysis
sql_snippet: SELECT n_name, SUM(l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount)) FROM CUSTOMER, ORDERS, LINEITEM, SUPPLIER, NATION, REGION

description: Forecasting Revenue Change - single table discount impact analysis
sql_snippet: SELECT SUM(l_extendedprice * l_discount) as revenue FROM LINEITEM WHERE l_shipdate >= date '1994-01-01'

description: Volume Shipping - 6-way join for cross-border shipping revenue by year
sql_snippet: SELECT supp_nation, cust_nation, l_year, SUM(volume) FROM (SELECT n1.n_name, n2.n_name, EXTRACT(year...))

description: National Market Share - 8-way join calculating market share by nation/year
sql_snippet: SELECT o_year, SUM(CASE WHEN nation='BRAZIL' THEN volume END) / SUM(volume) FROM (8-table subquery)

description: Product Type Profit Measure - 6-way join calculating profit by nation/year
sql_snippet: SELECT nation, o_year, SUM(amount) FROM (SELECT n_name, EXTRACT(year...), l_extendedprice - ps_supplycost)

description: Returned Item Reporting - 4-way join analyzing customer returns
sql_snippet: SELECT c_custkey, c_name, SUM(l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount)) FROM CUSTOMER, ORDERS, LINEITEM, NATION

description: Important Stock Identification - HAVING with subquery threshold comparison
sql_snippet: SELECT ps_partkey, SUM(ps_supplycost * ps_availqty) FROM PARTSUPP HAVING SUM(...) > (SELECT SUM(...) * 0.0001)

description: Shipping Modes and Order Priority - 2-way join with CASE aggregations
sql_snippet: SELECT l_shipmode, SUM(CASE WHEN o_orderpriority IN ('1-URGENT','2-HIGH') THEN 1 END) FROM ORDERS, LINEITEM

description: Customer Distribution - LEFT JOIN with double aggregation and NULL handling
sql_snippet: SELECT c_count, COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT c_custkey, COUNT(o_orderkey) FROM CUSTOMER LEFT JOIN ORDERS...)

description: Promotion Effect - 2-way join calculating promotion revenue percentage
sql_snippet: SELECT 100.00 * SUM(CASE WHEN p_type LIKE 'PROMO%' THEN ... END) / SUM(...) FROM LINEITEM, PART

description: Top Supplier Query - CTE with MAX subquery for top revenue supplier
sql_snippet: WITH revenue0 AS (SELECT l_suppkey, SUM(...) FROM LINEITEM...) SELECT s_suppkey, s_name... WHERE total_revenue = (SELECT MAX...)

description: Parts/Supplier Relationship - NOT IN subquery with DISTINCT COUNT
sql_snippet: SELECT p_brand, p_type, p_size, COUNT(DISTINCT ps_suppkey) FROM PARTSUPP, PART WHERE ps_suppkey NOT IN (SELECT...)

description: Small-Quantity-Order Revenue - correlated subquery comparing to AVG
sql_snippet: SELECT SUM(l_extendedprice) / 7.0 FROM LINEITEM, PART WHERE l_quantity < (SELECT 0.2 * AVG(l_quantity)...)

description: Large Volume Customer - IN subquery with HAVING filter for large orders
sql_snippet: SELECT c_name, c_custkey, o_orderkey... WHERE o_orderkey IN (SELECT l_orderkey FROM LINEITEM HAVING SUM(l_quantity) > 300)

description: Discounted Revenue - 2-way join with complex OR conditions across predicates
sql_snippet: SELECT SUM(l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount)) FROM LINEITEM, PART WHERE (p_brand='Brand#12' AND p_container IN...) OR...

description: Potential Part Promotion - 3-level nested IN subqueries with correlation
sql_snippet: SELECT s_name, s_address FROM SUPPLIER WHERE s_suppkey IN (SELECT ps_suppkey WHERE ps_partkey IN (SELECT p_partkey...))

description: Suppliers Who Kept Orders Waiting - EXISTS and NOT EXISTS with self-joins
sql_snippet: SELECT s_name, COUNT(*) FROM SUPPLIER, LINEITEM l1, ORDERS WHERE EXISTS (SELECT * FROM l2...) AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT * FROM l3...)

description: Global Sales Opportunity - NOT EXISTS with nested subquery for dormant customers
sql_snippet: SELECT cntrycode, COUNT(*), SUM(c_acctbal) FROM (SELECT SUBSTR(c_phone,1,2), c_acctbal WHERE c_acctbal > (SELECT AVG...) AND NOT EXISTS...)
